entity.label: Beth-le-aphrah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: (R.V. Micah 1:10), house of dust. The Authorized Version reads “in the house of Aphrah.” This is probably the name of a town in the Shephelah, or “low country,” between Joppa and Gaza.

nodes.label: Beth-le-aphrah
nodes.description: (R.V. Micah 1:10), house of dust. The Authorized Version reads “in the house of Aphrah.” This is probably the name of a town in the Shephelah, or “low country,” between Joppa and Gaza.

verses.text: Declare ye it not at Gath, weep ye not at all: in the house of Aphrah roll thyself in the dust.
